title: Module table without mod_ or module_ prefix after CMS_DB_PREFIX
description: A SQL query references CMS_DB_PREFIX concatenated with a table name that doesn't follow the mod_<name> or module_<name>_ convention, risking collision with core tables.
explanation: CMSMS reserves unprefixed table names for core. Module tables must use mod_<modulename>_ (preferred) or module_<modulename>_ to avoid collisions and make ownership clear.
fix: Rename tables to mod_<yourmodule>_<tablename>. The module_ prefix is also accepted for backward compatibility.
